purpose: Pre-register a no-paid coarse stress/regime review of October 2022 before seeking another exact SPY 1-minute bar source.
research_question: Does the already-downloaded 2022-10 stress month contain enough macro/volatility/0DTE quote context to justify continuing H-A2 exact rerun work, even though exact ORB execution remains blocked by missing 2022 SPY 1-minute bars?

decision_frame.data_resolution_principle: SPY 1-minute bars are required only for exact ORB execution evidence, not for coarse mechanism review.
decision_frame.allowed_claim: October 2022 is or is not a useful stress/regime window for prioritizing H-A2 follow-up.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim exact ORB entries/exits were tested.
Do not approve paper trading or operational validation.
Do not use this review to justify real-money trading.
Do not call this LLM/news evidence.

lookahead_policy.macro_calendar: scheduled events are known before the trade date when source timestamp policy supports it

continue_exact_rerun_research_if: At least one 0DTE quote-available day overlaps with prior-close or same-day high/stress VIX.
At least one 0DTE quote-available day overlaps with a high-importance macro event or the month has enough non-macro stress days to test the mechanism later.
deprioritize_exact_rerun_if: 0DTE quote availability is too sparse to cover the stress/macro regimes.
The month contains no useful volatility or macro-regime contrast for H-A2.
